content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento. CA 95814-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
Paul J. Mehnert 
Senior Deputy Counsel 
County Administration Center 
1600 Pacific Highway, Room 355 
San Diego, CA 92101-2469 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our file No. W-12-102 
Dear Mr. Mehnert: 
December 11, 2012 
The purpose of this correspondence is to advise you that because we have not received 
word from you since our last correspondence dated October 10, 2012, we have withdrawn your 
request for advice. 
However, if at a later date you determine that you do desire advice, you may simply 
request it anew at that time. 
VJ:jgl 
If you have any questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5783. 
Sincerely, 
1'9'1--
Valentina Joyce 
Counsel, Legal Division

sections.question_synthetic: Not applicable; this is a withdrawal notice rather than a response to a substantive legal question.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC has withdrawn the requestor's advice request due to lack of communication since October 10, 2012, but notes that a new request may be submitted at any time.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no substantive QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms withdrawal status through explicit statement of purpose. Contact information provided for follow-up.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Not applicable; this is a withdrawal notice rather than a response to a substantive legal question.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC has withdrawn the requestor's advice request due to lack of communication since October 10, 2012, but notes that a new request may be submitted at any time.

embedding.summary: The FPPC withdrew Paul J. Mehnert's request for advice (File No. W-12-102) due to absence of communication for over two months, while permitting resubmission in the future.
